entries.source: Reading knowledge plus formal speech routines
entries.value: Bralno znanje in formalni govorni vzorci
Nedavne politične rane so še sveže

entries.source: Recognition is useful, but it is weaker evidence than applying the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Prepoznavanje je koristno, vendar je šibkejši dokaz kot uporaba ideje brez odgovora pred očmi.

entries.source: Recommend opening questions for this encounter, grouped by interview, debate, contradiction, and legacy.
entries.value: Predlagaj uvodna vprašanja za to srečanje, razvrščena po intervjuju, razpravi, protislovju in zapuščini.

entries.source: Reconstruct a decision, alternatives, constraints, and outcomes.
entries.value: Rekonstruiraj odločitev, alternative, omejitve in izide.

entries.source: Red sandstone heat, ink, perfumed paper, controlled silence, and many languages orbiting power.
entries.value: Vročina rdečega peščenjaka, črnilo, odišavljen papir, nadzorovana tišina in številni jeziki, ki krožijo okoli moči.

entries.source: Reframe my next question as a student trying to understand the mental model, not just the biography.
entries.value: Preoblikuj moje naslednje vprašanje, kot da ga postavlja učenec, ki želi razumeti miselni model, ne le biografije.

entries.source: Remove weak, generic, or low-fit ideas quickly.
entries.value: Hitro odstrani šibke, splošne ali neprimerne ideje.

entries.source: Removes the failing path instead of understanding it.
entries.value: Odstrani neuspešno pot, namesto da bi jo razumel.

entries.source: Repairing the misconception makes the next problem easier instead of just more familiar.
entries.value: Popravljanje napačne predstave olajša naslednjo nalogo, namesto da bi bila le bolj znana.

entries.source: Repeating a definition without applying it can feel fluent while hiding gaps.
entries.value: Ponavljanje definicije brez uporabe lahko deluje tekoče, hkrati pa skriva vrzeli.

entries.source: Rephrase the active question in simpler language. Ask only one question.
entries.value: Preoblikuj trenutno vprašanje v preprostejši jezik. Zastavi samo eno vprašanje.
Zahtevaj povzetek in žig v potnem listu

entries.source: Reset the controls, move only one slider, and describe the before-and-after in plain language.
entries.value: Ponastavi kontrolnike, premakni samo en drsnik in v preprostem jeziku opiši stanje prej in potem.

entries.source: Resolve the event clock before opening the world
entries.value: Razreši uro dogodka, preden odpreš svet

entries.source: Restaurants and drivers can be suppliers, but this specific clue is about customers comparing and switching.
entries.value: Restavracije in vozniki so lahko dobavitelji, vendar ta konkretni namig govori o tem, da kupci primerjajo in prehajajo drugam.

entries.source: Restoration London faces plague memory, dense timber housing, and a fire that will reshape the city.
entries.value: London v času restavracije se sooča s spominom na kugo, gosto leseno pozidavo in požarom, ki bo preoblikoval mesto.

entries.source: Reveal the starting model before the lesson explains it.
entries.value: Razkrij začetni model, preden ga lekcija pojasni.

entries.source: Rewrite the current rough section as a suggested edit. Show what changed and why before asking me to merge it.
entries.value: Prepiši trenutni grobi razdelek kot predlagani popravek. Preden me prosiš za združitev, pokaži, kaj se je spremenilo in zakaj.

entries.source: Right. Transfer to a fresh example is stronger evidence than recognition.
entries.value: Prav. Prenos na svež primer je močnejši dokaz kot prepoznavanje.

entries.source: Right. You identified a seller-side cost shock and predicted the pressure on price.
entries.value: Prav. Prepoznan je stroškovni šok na strani prodajalca in napovedan pritisk na ceno.

entries.source: Roman trade used amphorae and contracts
entries.value: Rimska trgovina je uporabljala amfore in pogodbe
Govorice se lahko obrnejo proti tujcem
Širijo se govorice o kraljevih četah

entries.source: Rumors move faster than verified news
entries.value: Govorice potujejo hitreje kot preverjene novice

entries.source: Rupees, silver coin, credit through trusted households
entries.value: Rupije, srebrnik, kredit prek zaupanja vrednih gospodinjstev

entries.source: Safe, explanatory, and easier to pause for context.
entries.value: Varno, pojasnjevalno in lažje ustavljivo za kontekst.

entries.source: Safer, more explanatory, and allowed to ask modern comparisons.
entries.value: Varnejše, bolj pojasnjevalno in dovoljeno prositi za sodobne primerjave.

entries.source: Salt air, olive oil, rope fiber, shouted accounts, and the heavy logistics behind imperial abundance.
entries.value: Slan zrak, oljčno olje, vlakna vrvi, glasno izklicani računi in težka logistika za cesarskim obiljem.

entries.source: Salt March strategist, St. Helena retrospective, 1946 committee room...
entries.value: Strateg Solnega pohoda, retrospektiva s Svete Helene, sejna soba odbora leta 1946...

entries.source: Say why the mistake is tempting, then name the missing link.
entries.value: Povej, zakaj je napaka mamljiva, nato poimenuj manjkajočo povezavo.

entries.source: Saying revenue is up, so the company is worth more ignores margins, reinvestment, working capital, and risk.
entries.value: Trditev, da so prihodki zrasli, zato je podjetje vredno več, prezre marže, ponovne naložbe, obratni kapital in tveganje.

entries.source: Seeing the output change but not naming the mechanism.
entries.value: Videti spremembo izhoda, ne da bi poimenovali mehanizem.

entries.source: Set a place, period, and mission. Your guide will keep the trip bounded to the era and mark speculation clearly.
entries.value: Določi kraj, obdobje in misijo. Tvoj vodnik bo potovanje omejil na to dobo in jasno označil ugibanja.

entries.source: Set a thinking target and I will ask the first diagnostic question.
entries.value: Določi miselni cilj, nato zastavim prvo diagnostično vprašanje.

entries.source: Several locations, figures, artifacts, and field notes.
entries.value: Več lokacij, osebnosti, artefaktov in terenskih zapiskov.

entries.source: Short factual notes clarify uncertainty, bias, and interpretation.
entries.value: Kratke stvarne opombe pojasnijo negotovost, pristranskost in razlago.

entries.source: Short summaries keep both sides aligned before moving on.
entries.value: Kratki povzetki ohranjajo obe strani usklajeni pred nadaljevanjem.

entries.source: Should a company enter this market?
entries.value: Ali naj podjetje vstopi na ta trg?

entries.source: Show more uncertainty, anachronism, and source-boundary notes.
entries.value: Pokaži več negotovosti, anahronizmov in opomb o mejah virov.

entries.source: Show the person's major beliefs at this time, their blind spots, and what they would likely resist understanding.
entries.value: Pokaži glavna prepričanja te osebe v tem času, njene slepe pege in čemur bi se verjetno upirala razumeti.

entries.source: Sketch the outline, sections, or table before polishing language.
entries.value: Skiciraj oris, razdelke ali tabelo, preden izpiliš jezik.

entries.source: Small nudges arrive before direct explanations.
entries.value: Majhni namigi pridejo pred neposrednimi razlagami.

entries.source: Small reserve in local coin or credit
entries.value: Majhna rezerva v lokalnem kovancu ali kreditu

entries.source: Socrates was tried and executed in 399 BCE
entries.value: Sokratu so sodili in ga usmrtili leta 399 pr. n. št.

entries.source: someone who changed education and faced serious opposition
entries.value: nekdo, ki je spremenil izobraževanje in se soočil z resnim nasprotovanjem

entries.source: Sources, confidence, uncertainty, and forbidden quotes.
entries.value: Viri, zanesljivost, negotovost in prepovedani citati.

entries.source: Specific prices vary by evidence and period
entries.value: Konkretne cene se razlikujejo glede na dokaze in obdobje

entries.source: Specific private opinions of unnamed residents
Split work into AI-owned, user-owned, and shared moves.
entries.value: Razdeli delo na korake UI, uporabnika in skupne korake.
Katedrala sv. Pavla je bila uničena

entries.source: Stage the person, year, room, and relationship.
entries.value: Postavi osebo, leto, prostor in odnos.

entries.source: Standing idle with strange questions during a disaster invites suspicion.
entries.value: Če med nesrečo stojiš brez dela in postavljaš čudna vprašanja, vzbujaš sum.

entries.source: Start a Time Travel expedition. Do not open a generic chat and do not write a broad period summary.
entries.value: Začni odpravo skozi čas. Ne odpri splošnega klepeta in ne piši širokega povzetka obdobja.

entries.source: Start with a concept, case, argument, decision, or text.
entries.value: Začni s konceptom, primerom, argumentom, odločitvijo ali besedilom.

entries.source: Start with a question, not a lecture.
entries.value: Začni z vprašanjem, ne s predavanjem.

entries.source: Start with a tiny lesson, one check question, a mastery meter, and wait for my answer before continuing.
entries.value: Začni z majhno lekcijo, enim preverjalnim vprašanjem, merilnikom obvladovanja in počakaj na moj odgovor, preden nadaljuješ.

entries.source: Start with an era passport, a vivid arrival scene, three choices for what to do next, and a compact timeline log.
entries.value: Začni s potnim listom obdobja, živim prizorom prihoda, tremi izbirami za naslednji korak in strnjenim dnevnikom časovnice.

entries.source: Start with one specific question or task.
entries.value: Začni z enim konkretnim vprašanjem ali nalogo.

entries.source: State the idea in one sentence so it can be tested.
entries.value: Povej idejo v enem stavku, da jo je mogoče preizkusiti.

entries.source: State your starting idea so the tutor has something to test.
entries.value: Navedi svojo začetno idejo, da ima tutor nekaj za preizkus.

entries.source: Stateful exploration with consequences and evolving risk.
entries.value: Raziskovanje s stanjem, posledicami in razvijajočim se tveganjem.

entries.source: Step by step, brainstorm first, solve together...
entries.value: Korak za korakom, najprej možganska nevihta, rešujva skupaj...

entries.source: Step out of character briefly. Explain the historical context, evidence quality, and uncertainties behind the last exchange.
entries.value: Za trenutek izstopi iz vloge. Pojasni zgodovinski kontekst, kakovost dokazov in negotovosti za zadnjo izmenjavo.

entries.source: Stone dust, wool dye, bells, and sharp political glances under a crowded square.
entries.value: Kamniti prah, barvilo za volno, zvonovi in ostri politični pogledi pod prenatrpanim trgom.

entries.source: Stop editing directly for this turn. Give concise advice and one practical next move.
entries.value: V tej potezi nehaj neposredno urejati. Podaj jedrnat nasvet in en praktičen naslednji korak.

entries.source: Stopped. Send another message whenever you are ready.
entries.value: Ustavljeno. Pošlji drugo sporočilo, ko boš pripravljen.

entries.source: Strict mode keeps modern knowledge out of the world and applies social consequences sooner.
entries.value: Strogi način zadrži sodobno znanje zunaj sveta in prej uporabi družbene posledice.

entries.source: Strong writing is a chain of claim, reason, evidence, and consequence. Each sentence should do a job in that chain.
entries.value: Močno pisanje je veriga trditve, razloga, dokaza in posledice. Vsak stavek mora v tej verigi opraviti svoje delo.

entries.source: Substitutes are alternatives like cooking or pickup. Comparing apps is buyer leverage inside the category.
entries.value: Substituti so alternative, kot sta kuhanje ali prevzem. Primerjanje aplikacij je kupčeva pogajalska moč znotraj kategorije.

entries.source: Suggest candidates with strong evidence and vivid settings.
entries.value: Predlagaj kandidate z močnimi dokazi in živimi okolji.
Zaloge in zvestobe so pod pritiskom

entries.source: Supply shifts left and price tends to rise.
entries.value: Ponudba se premakne v levo in cena praviloma naraste.

entries.source: Take the first pass on the shared artifact. Make the structure visible, mark assumptions, and ask me to accept, edit, or reject.
entries.value: Pripravi prvi poskus skupnega artefakta. Naj bo struktura vidna, označi predpostavke in me prosi, naj sprejmem, uredim ali zavrnem.

entries.source: Tang Chang'an is a cosmopolitan imperial capital linked to steppe, Central Asian, and Buddhist networks.
entries.value: Tangovski Chang'an je svetovljanska cesarska prestolnica, povezana s stepskimi, srednjeazijskimi in budističnimi omrežji.

entries.source: Target: one sentence describing the learning target.
entries.value: Cilj: en stavek, ki opiše učni cilj.
Nauči me o Porterjevih petih silah

entries.source: That catches the revenue movement, but misses the margin and cash timing links. Sales alone do not prove cash flow improved.
entries.value: To ujame gibanje prihodkov, vendar zgreši povezave z maržo in časovnim potekom denarja. Sama prodaja ne dokazuje, da se je denarni tok izboljšal.

entries.source: That may hide the symptom, but it does not teach you where the data flow broke.
entries.value: To lahko skrije simptom, vendar te ne nauči, kje se je pretok podatkov pokvaril.

entries.source: The assistant must identify known facts before simulating
entries.value: Asistent mora pred simulacijo prepoznati znana dejstva

entries.source: The Athenian agora was a civic center
entries.value: Atenska agora je bila državljansko središče

entries.source: The explanation that links evidence back to the claim.
entries.value: Razlaga, ki dokaze poveže nazaj s trditvijo.

entries.source: The final summary waits until you have done real thinking.
entries.value: Končni povzetek počaka, dokler ne opraviš resničnega razmišljanja.

entries.source: The first scene should become concrete only after the destination is resolved.
entries.value: Prvi prizor naj postane konkreten šele, ko je cilj razrešen.
Veliki požar se je začel leta 1666

entries.source: The Indian Rebellion of 1857 has made Delhi a contested imperial and military space.
entries.value: Indijski upor leta 1857 je Delhi spremenil v sporen imperialni in vojaški prostor.

entries.source: The learner can connect a variable change to an outcome.
entries.value: Učenec lahko poveže spremembo spremenljivke z izidom.

entries.source: The learner can explain the key link in their own words.
entries.value: Učenec lahko pojasni ključno povezavo s svojimi besedami.

entries.source: The learner can identify and fix the misconception.
entries.value: Učenec lahko prepozna in popravi napačno predstavo.

entries.source: The learner can make a first prediction.
The learner explains it back in their own words.
entries.value: Učenec to razloži nazaj s svojimi besedami.

entries.source: The longest sentence, because shorter is always stronger.
entries.value: Najdaljši stavek, ker je krajše vedno močnejše.

entries.source: The person should not know future events unless you explicitly open modern confrontation.
entries.value: Oseba ne sme poznati prihodnjih dogodkov, razen če izrecno odpreš sodobno soočenje.

entries.source: The Roman Empire under Trajan's final year depends on ports, credit, labor, and imperial logistics.
entries.value: Rimski imperij v zadnjem Trajanovem letu je odvisen od pristanišč, kredita, dela in imperialne logistike.

entries.source: The scene is being established by the dossier.
The simulation will prioritize different people, risks, objects, and explanations.
entries.value: Simulacija bo dala prednost različnim ljudem, tveganjem, predmetom in razlagam.

entries.source: The title, because every weak paragraph has a weak title.
entries.value: Naslov, ker ima vsak šibek odstavek šibek naslov.

entries.source: The Travel Designer should resolve this intent into a specific historical place, date, and political moment before arrival.
entries.value: Oblikovalec potovanja mora ta namen razrešiti v konkreten zgodovinski kraj, datum in politični trenutek pred prihodom.

entries.source: The version of a person matters more than the name.
entries.value: Različica osebe je pomembnejša od imena.

entries.source: The West Market hosted long-distance trade
entries.value: Zahodni trg je gostil trgovino na dolge razdalje

entries.source: This is the evidence checkpoint. You advance only by showing the skill.
entries.value: To je preverjanje dokazov. Napreduješ samo tako, da pokažeš veščino.

entries.source: This lets you explain why a model moves instead of just copying formulas.
entries.value: To ti omogoča pojasniti, zakaj se model premika, namesto da bi samo prepisoval formule.

entries.source: Time slice: not chosen yet. If a specific person is named, offer 4 to 5 historically meaningful versions of this person before any in-character dialogue. Explain how each version changes the worldview, stakes, and setting.
entries.value: Časovni izsek: še ni izbran. Če je imenovana konkretna oseba, pred vsakim dialogom v vlogi ponudi 4 do 5 zgodovinsko pomembnih različic te osebe. Pojasni, kako vsaka različica spremeni pogled na svet, vložke in okolje.

entries.source: Titles matter, but this clue points to reasoning inside the paragraph.
entries.value: Naslovi so pomembni, vendar ta namig kaže na sklepanje znotraj odstavka.

entries.source: Trace a trade route on the map
trace cause and effect in code
entries.value: sledi vzroku in posledici v kodi

entries.source: Track accepted changes, rejected changes, and the next edit.
entries.value: Spremljaj sprejete spremembe, zavrnjene spremembe in naslednji popravek.

entries.source: Track decisions and open questions. Preserve my voice in writing tasks. Ask at most one practical question if context is missing.
entries.value: Spremljaj odločitve in odprta vprašanja. Pri pisnih nalogah ohrani moj glas. Če manjka kontekst, zastavi največ eno praktično vprašanje.
